nasb.text: Or how can you say to your brother, ‘Let me take the speck out of your eye,’ and behold, the log is in your own eye?

esv.text: Or how can you say to your brother, ‘Let me take the speck out of your eye,’ when there is the log in your own eye?

cnv.text: 你自己眼中有梁木，怎能對弟兄說：‘讓我除掉你眼中的木屑’呢？

ccb.text: 既然你自己眼中有大梁，又怎么能对弟兄说‘让我除去你眼中的小刺’呢？

csbs.text: 又怎么能对你弟兄说‘让我除掉你眼里的木屑’呢？看哪，你自己眼里还有梁木呢！
